gates.rule: Unit tests and host-independence integration (host_git) stay green
Git host sets verified only when required profiles exist; missing profile fails closed; gate maps verification.verified to Outcome
Anti-reward tripwire inventory and anti_reward cheat-order tests remain present
Host/gate/tripwire tests must not contain test-gaming smells

gates.reason: Local pre-push runs the four T1 checkers via scripts/verify.sh; full cargo test is the CI floor and flake arm
gates.rule: Full cargo test (unit + integration) on every CI push
